title: Jorrel Hato kills Port Vale’s FA Cup dream in 64 seconds as Chelsea hit seven
description: Chelsea brushed aside League One Port Vale, winning 7-0 to reach the semi-finals of the FA Cup

title: US authorities arrest relatives of late Iranian military commander who were living in Los Angeles
description: State department said niece and grandniece of Qassem Soleimani, killed in 2020 US drone strike, celebrated attacks against US soldiers
content:
US federal agents have arrested the niece and grandniece of the late Iranian military commander Qassem Soleimani after the Trump administration’s top diplomat, Marco Rubio, revoked their lawful permanent resident status, officials said on Saturday.

title: Iran reports new attacks on Bushehr nuclear plant, sparking IAEA warning
description: The International Atomic Energy Agency urges restraint to avoid a nuclear accident at Iran's Bushehr plant.
content:
The area around Iran's Bushehr nuclear power plant has been attacked for the fourth time during the current war, Iranian officials say, as the US and Israel continue to target energy and other industrial sites.
